mark_scheme.accept_en: Line B (correct reflection point on mirror) and direction from ball via mirror to eye.
mark_scheme.accept_zh: B 线（镜面正确反射点）+ 方向从球经镜子到眼睛。
mark_scheme.reject_en: Any other line, or direction from eye to ball.
mark_scheme.reject_zh: 其他线，或方向从眼睛射向球。
mark_scheme.ignore_en: Minor inaccuracies in line position are not graded.
mark_scheme.ignore_zh: 线条位置轻微偏差不计。
